hero.subtitle: Meet My Hayat — the first AI mental health companion purpose-built for Lebanon. Trained on real anonymized clinical data, speaking your dialect, understanding your world. ☕️
features.zeroJudgment.title: Clinically Grounded
features.zeroJudgment.desc: Trained on anonymized therapy sessions from Lebanese clinics — not internet data. Our AI understands clinical dynamics and therapeutic techniques.
features.dialect.title: Lebanese Dialect
features.dialect.desc: "Kifak?" "Ça va?" We speak your language. Our model understands the emotional weight behind Lebanese Arabic expressions.
features.247.title: Here 24/7
features.247.desc: Insomnia at 3 AM? Anxiety before a meeting? Purpose-built safety means My Hayat is always available and 94% safer than generic AI.
echoes.title: Reflect & Grow with
echoes.desc: Track your mood patterns, journal your thoughts, and get personalized insights into your well-being journey. It's like a diary that actually helps you figure things out!
testimonials.title: Community
testimonials.subtitle: Join thousands of Lebanese users who found their safe space with My Hayat.
testimonials.1.name: Layla K.
testimonials.1.quote: "Finally, an app that understands what 'shou l wade3' actually means. It feels like talking to a real friend."
testimonials.2.name: Rami H.
testimonials.2.quote: "I use Echoes every night to clear my head. The insights are surprisingly accurate!"
testimonials.3.name: Yara M.
testimonials.3.quote: "Zero judgment, 100% support. It's the best thing I've downloaded this year."
cta.subtitle: Start chatting with My Hayat today. Free, private, and always on your side.
footer.tagline: Your culturally attuned AI companion, here to listen, understand, and guide you through life's ups and downs in Lebanese Arabic.
footer.stayDesc: Join our community for mental health tips and My Hayat updates.
footer.copyright: My Hayat. Made with ❤️ and 🇱🇧 resilience.
about.hero.title: Built for Lebanon,
about.hero.subtitle: My Hayat was born from a simple truth: everyone deserves mental health support in their own language, culture, and context.
about.crisis.title: The Crisis
about.crisis.stat1.label: Below poverty line
about.crisis.stat2.label: Feel shame seeking help
about.crisis.stat3.label: Experience depression/anxiety
about.crisis.stat4.label: Access professional services
about.crisis.desc: Lebanon faces a perfect storm: economic collapse, persistent stigma, healthcare brain drain, and unaddressed trauma from decades of conflict. Professional therapy costs $100/session — 200+ hours of minimum wage work.
about.mission.title: Our Mission
about.mission.desc: We believe mental health support should be immediate, private, culturally attuned, and accessible to everyone — regardless of their economic situation or family context.
about.team.title: Advisory Board
about.team.drFadi.name: Dr. Fadi
about.team.drFadi.bio: Former head of psychiatry at a major Lebanese hospital. Oversees clinical accuracy and crisis protocols.
about.team.drSafia.name: Dr. Safia
about.team.drSafia.bio: EMDR certified with 15 years working with conflict-affected populations. Guides cultural appropriateness and human connection.
about.values.title: Our Values
about.values.1.title: Privacy First
about.values.1.desc: Anonymous, encrypted, 100% confidential. Your conversations are yours alone.
about.values.2.title: Cultural Fluency
about.values.2.desc: Not translated — built from the ground up in Lebanese Arabic with local idioms and values.
about.values.3.title: Evidence-Based
about.values.3.desc: CBT, DBT, ACT techniques adapted for Lebanese context by our clinical team.
about.values.4.title: Always Available
about.values.4.desc: 24/7 support. No waiting lists, no appointments, no judgment.
howItWorks.title: How
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to feeling better — on your terms, in your language.
howItWorks.step1.title: Start Chatting
howItWorks.step1.desc: Open My Hayat and say hi — in Arabic, English, or Arabizi. No sign-up needed for basic support.
howItWorks.step2.title: Get Support
howItWorks.step2.desc: My Hayat listens, validates, and offers evidence-based tools: breathing exercises, thought reframing, grounding techniques.
howItWorks.step3.title: Grow Stronger
howItWorks.step3.desc: Track your mood, journal your thoughts, and build healthy coping habits over time with Echoes.
howItWorks.personas.title: Real Stories,
howItWorks.persona1.name: Aya, 22
howItWorks.persona1.story: Conservative family context, anxiety during conflict flare-ups. Uses WhatsApp voice notes for comfort at 3 AM.
howItWorks.persona2.name: Rami, 28
howItWorks.persona2.story: Economic stress, insomnia, code-switches Arabic/English. Uses late-night web chat to process his day.
howItWorks.persona3.name: Samar, 35
howItWorks.persona3.story: Grief and distance trauma. Uses Echoes for ritualized remembrance of her late mother.
howItWorks.security.title: Your Privacy,
howItWorks.security.2: No PII collected by default — fully anonymous
howItWorks.security.3: Data export and deletion at any time
pricing.title: Choose Your
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you're ready. Cancel anytime.
pricing.free.name: Free
pricing.premium.name: Premium
pricing.plus.name: Premium Plus
pricing.faq.title: Questions?
pricing.faq.a1: Yes! No contracts, no commitments. Cancel from your account settings.
pricing.faq.a2: Absolutely. All conversations are encrypted. We never share your data. You can delete everything at any time.
pricing.faq.a3: Echoes is our premium grief support feature that lets you hear supportive reflections in a reproduced voice of a departed loved one. It's a symbolic remembrance experience, not real communication.
pricing.faq.a4: No. My Hayat is a support companion, not a replacement for professional care. We actively connect users with therapists when appropriate.
contact.title: Get in
contact.subtitle: Questions, partnerships, or just want to say hi? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.form.name: Your Name
contact.form.success: Message sent! We'll get back to you soon.
